_doc: Starter catalog of dnd5e items used by the character-creation wizard. Keys are stable slugs referenced by dnd5e_starting_kits.json and by player purchases. Prices in gp; weight in lb. Only fields meaningful to a given category are populated.

longsword.name: Longsword
longsword.description: A versatile martial blade — the standard sidearm of trained warriors.

shortsword.name: Shortsword
shortsword.description: A light, finesse blade favoured by duellists and rogues.

quarterstaff.name: Quarterstaff
quarterstaff.description: A length of hardwood — also a serviceable arcane focus.

leather_armor.name: Leather Armor
leather_armor.description: Boiled and tooled hide. Light, quiet.

chain_shirt.name: Chain Shirt
chain_shirt.description: Mail worn under a tunic — practical for adventurers.

chain_mail.name: Chain Mail
chain_mail.description: Full mail with greaves and a coif.

explorers_pack.name: Explorer's Pack
explorers_pack.description: Backpack, bedroll, mess kit, tinderbox, 10 torches, 10 days rations, waterskin, 50 ft hempen rope.

dungeoneers_pack.name: Dungeoneer's Pack
dungeoneers_pack.description: Backpack, crowbar, hammer, 10 pitons, 10 torches, tinderbox, 10 days rations, waterskin, 50 ft hempen rope.

scholars_pack.name: Scholar's Pack
scholars_pack.description: Backpack, book of lore, ink, ink pen, 10 sheets of parchment, little bag of sand, small knife.

burglars_pack.name: Burglar's Pack
burglars_pack.description: Backpack, ball bearings (1000), 10 ft string, bell, 5 candles, crowbar, hammer, 10 pitons, hooded lantern, 2 flasks of oil, 5 days rations, tinderbox, waterskin, 50 ft hempen rope.

thieves_tools.name: Thieves' Tools
thieves_tools.description: Lockpicks and a small file. Required for picking locks and disarming traps.

healers_kit.name: Healer's Kit
healers_kit.description: Ten uses; stabilises a dying creature without a check.

potion_of_healing.name: Potion of Healing
potion_of_healing.description: Drink as an action: regain 2d4+2 HP.

torch.name: Torch
torch.description: Burns for one hour, casting bright light in a 20-ft radius.

rations_1.name: Rations (1 day)
rations_1.description: Dry, packaged food sufficient for one person for one day.

holy_symbol.name: Holy Symbol
holy_symbol.description: Amulet, emblem or reliquary — required as a divine focus.

arcane_focus_orb.name: Arcane Focus (Orb)
arcane_focus_orb.description: A polished crystal sphere — substitutes for material components without a cost.

arcane_focus_wand.name: Arcane Focus (Wand)
arcane_focus_wand.description: A slender length of yew. Substitutes for material components without a cost.

spellbook.name: Spellbook
spellbook.description: A leather-bound tome of 100 blank vellum pages. Required by scholars / wizards.

component_pouch.name: Component Pouch
component_pouch.description: A small belt pouch of common spell components.

lantern_hooded.name: Hooded Lantern
lantern_hooded.description: Bright light in a 30-ft radius for 6 hours per flask of oil.

oil_flask.name: Oil (flask)
oil_flask.description: One flask: lantern fuel for 6 hours, or improvised incendiary.
